description: WESTWIND - 3 bdrm end unit, needs your updates and priced accordingly... inner quiet part of West Chelsea, a family friendly complex. Tucked away from the main road, this home enjoys a peaceful setting within the complex & backs onto greenspace with a sunny west-facing backyard, perfect for afternoon & evening enjoyment. Gas BBQ Hookup available. Side entrance gate convenient for kids to enjoy the amenities or take your dog for a walk. Gated backyard an option if desired. Loved by long-term owners, this home offers a spacious floor plan with entertainment-sized living and dining rooms and a large kitchen with eating area. The primary bedroom features a 2-piece ensuite, and plenty of storage throughout.
